description: Design UI — Impact/effort matrix: Visual 2x2 scatter plot view alongside the card/lane view. X-axis: estimated effort (S/M/L, assignable during triage). Y-axis: estimated impact (low/medium/high). Ideas plotted as dots colored by cluster. Quadrant labels: Quick Wins (high impact, low effort), Big Bets (high impact, high effort), Fill-ins (low impact, low effort), Money Pits (low impact, high effort). Click dot → context panel. Drag dot to reassign effort/impact.
